name: Data Addressability
description: Unified addressing for all data types with @address syntax

content.title: Data Addressability
content.content:
# Data Addressability

MeshWeaver makes every piece of data addressable through a unified notation. Whether you need structured records, documents, or AI agents - the syntax is consistent.

## The Core Principle

> **Every piece of data has an address.**

This simple principle unlocks powerful capabilities:
- AI can request any data by address
- Relationships between data items become explicit
- Context can be assembled dynamically
- Data flows naturally across system boundaries

## Address Syntax

```
@addressType/addressId[/keyword[/path]]
```

### Keywords

| Keyword | Purpose | Returns |
|---------|---------|--------|
| `data` | Fetch data entities | JSON data |
| `content` | Fetch file content | Rendered based on mime type |
| `area` | Display layout area | UI component (default) |

### Special Prefixes

| Prefix | Purpose | Example |
|--------|---------|--------|
| `@agent/` | Select AI agent | `@agent/ClaimsProcessor` |
| `@model/` | Select AI model | `@model/gpt-4` |

## Example Addresses

```
@app/Claims/data/CLM-001234          # A specific claim record
@app/Contracts/data/CNT-5678         # A contract
@app/Docs/content/Reports/Q4.pdf     # A PDF document
@app/Claims/ClaimsDashboard          # A layout area
@agent/DocumentClassifier            # An AI agent
```

For paths with spaces: `@"app/Docs/content/My Report.pdf"`

## How Addressability Enables AI

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant AI as AI Agent
    participant Mesh as MeshWeaver
    participant Sources as Data Sources

    AI->>Mesh: Request @app/Claims/data/CLM-001234
    Mesh->>Sources: Resolve to source system
    Sources->>Mesh: Return claim data
    Mesh->>AI: Deliver with metadata

    AI->>Mesh: Request @app/Contracts/data/CNT-5678
    Mesh->>Sources: Resolve to contracts system
    Sources->>Mesh: Return contract
    Mesh->>AI: Deliver contract context

    AI->>AI: Process with full context
```

## Connecting Structured and Unstructured

Addressability bridges the gap between databases and documents:

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph "Structured Data"
        A[Claims Database]
        B[Contract System]
        C[Client Master]
    end

    subgraph "Unstructured Data"
        D[Document Repository]
        E[Email Archives]
        F[Image Storage]
    end

    subgraph "MeshWeaver Addressability"
        G[Unified Address Space]
    end

    A --> G
    B --> G
    C --> G
    D --> G
    E --> G
    F --> G

    G --> H[AI Context Assembly]
```

## Benefits

| Challenge | Without Addressability | With MeshWeaver |
|-----------|----------------------|----------------|
| Finding related data | Manual search across systems | Direct address lookup |
| Building AI context | Custom integration per source | Uniform address requests |
| Linking records | Hardcoded relationships | Dynamic resolution |
| Cross-system queries | Multiple APIs and formats | Single query language |
